notes:
## 2.10.2

## What's new

- **Website sync reliability** — Fixed parent remote “Failed to fetch” / empty linked phones (CORS-safe GitHub calls). Unsaved Controls no longer wiped by auto-refresh. Focus app category from the site now maps correctly on the phone.
- **Family pairing** — Parent family codes only show after they publish successfully; reuses an existing 6-digit code when present.
- **Weekend Fun** — Bonus minutes no longer double-count or stick into Monday.
- **Home polish** — Wallpaper respects Light/low-RAM performance; to-dos no longer block Fun when the parent hasn’t published a list.
- **Dashboard mobile** — Menu toggle works on small screens; clearer OTP / empty-phone states.
